description: This video explains Binance Liquid Swap (BSwap), a liquidity pool-based platform for exchanging crypto assets. It covers how to add liquidity, earn fees, and swap cryptocurrencies efficiently.
topic_summary: Learn about Binance Liquid Swap, its liquidity pool mechanics, how to add/remove liquidity, and the benefits of trading on the platform. Key features include earning interest and quick swaps [t=4:08-190:08].
